onboarding.title: Business Information
onboarding.staff_desc: You can invite them later. For now, we just need their names for the booking calendar.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.ready_desc1: We'll set up standard working hours (9 AM - 5 PM, Mon-Fri) which you can customize later in the dashboard.
onboarding.ready_desc2: You'll also start on a 14-day free trial of our Professional Plan (€30/month).

booking.no_appointments: Unfortunately, there are no available appointments for the selected date.
booking.choose_another_date: Please choose another date or professional.
booking.success_msg: Your appointment has been successfully scheduled.

imageUploader.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG and WEBP (maximum 1 MB with automatic compression)

system.unexpected_error: Something went wrong. Please refresh the page and try again.

auth.confirmed: Email confirmed successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.access_description: Sign in once. The platform will load the business and industry connected to your account.
auth.authorized_only: Business owners and authorised staff only. Customers access accounts through each business’s public page.
auth.secure_workspace: One secure workspace for every business type
auth.hero_title: Manage your business from one professional platform.
auth.hero_description: Your account opens the correct workspace automatically—whatever service industry you operate in.
auth.secure_access_text: Each company’s customers, staff and operational records remain separated inside the platform.
auth.membership_note: One login page is intentionally used for every owner. Your membership determines the correct business and theme after authentication.

dashboard_home.description: Monitor today’s operation, staff workload and upcoming business activity from one workspace.

schedule.title: Today’s schedule
schedule.description: Daily calendar divided into columns for each professional.
schedule.add_employee_hint: Add an employee to display the daily staff calendar.

alerts.title: Today’s Alerts
alerts.description: Operational items that need your attention today.
alerts.none_detail: Your appointments, staffing and notifications look healthy.
alerts.unread_detail: Open the bell to review new appointments and customers.
alerts.unassigned_detail: Assign a professional before the appointment begins.
alerts.cancelled_detail: Review the calendar and refill the available time.
alerts.without_break_detail: Review today’s staff schedule and working pattern.

newAppointment.title: New appointment
newAppointment.description: Complete the steps below. Only valid staff and available slots are shown.

customerStep.description: Search an existing customer or create a new one.

servicesStep.description: Select one or more compatible services.

professionalStep.description: Only staff eligible for all selected services appear.

dateStep.description: Only real available times are displayed.
dateStep.noneAvailable: No available appointments for this selection. Choose another date or professional.

reviewStep.title: Review
reviewStep.description: Confirm the booking details before creating the appointment.

delay.title: Create delay
delay.description: Delay the selected professional's active appointments from a specific time. Review every affected appointment before applying.
delay.warning: All displayed appointments move together. If any appointment would overlap another booking, a break, or working hours, nothing will be changed.

messages.noAffectedAppointments: No active appointments are affected by this delay

errors.businessClosure: Appointments cannot be created during a business closure
errors.moveRestored: The appointment could not be moved. It was restored.
errors.resizeRestored: The appointment duration could not be changed. It was restored.
errors.delayRequired: Select professional, date, start time and delay
errors.applyDelay: The delay could not be applied. No appointments were changed.

states.emptyCategory: No customers found in this category.

form.manualCustomerNote: Customers created manually by the owner are stored as guest contacts. A customer becomes registered only after creating and linking an authentication account.

ai.introduction: Velliqo AI is being prepared to help {{business}} understand performance, customers and scheduling.

cards.insightsDescription: Turn business activity into clear, practical recommendations.
cards.businessHealthDescription: Understand the operational health of your business at a glance.
cards.customerIntelligenceDescription: Identify customer patterns, retention opportunities and service preferences.
cards.schedulingDescription: Surface demand patterns and opportunities to improve capacity.

ai.foundationDescription: AI access is controlled by business permissions, language and approved data scopes.
ai.settingsDescription: Control how Velliqo AI works with your business data.
ai.enableAIDescription: Allow authorised users to access AI-assisted features for this business.
ai.conversationHistoryDescription: Keep AI conversations so authorised users can return to previous work.
ai.customerDataDescription: Allow AI features to use approved customer information when permissions permit.
